# amiExilAI
> Companion AI pentru Diaspora & Viața în Străinătate — dual-engine verified

## What is amiExilAI?
amiExilAI is a dual-engine AI companion for Romanian diaspora and expat families. Two AI models (Grok + DeepSeek) cross-verify every response — advice on documents, taxes, healthcare, education, and integration you can trust.

## Features
- Legal & administrative (residence, work permits, family reunification, consular)
- Taxes & finance (double taxation, tax residency, pension transfers, social security EU)
- Healthcare (EHIC/CEAM, GP registration, emergencies, prescriptions)
- Education (school enrollment, diploma recognition ENIC-NARIC, bilingual education)
- Cultural integration (language, customs, homesickness, community building)
- Return to Romania (re-integration, property, business, pension transfer)

## Architecture
- Dual-engine: Grok 4.5 (xAI) + DeepSeek
- Anti-confabulation: trigram-cosine concordance >= 0.45 required
- Stateless: queries processed in real-time, never stored

## Compliance
- EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art. 50 — limited-risk, full transparency
- GDPR (Reg. 2016/679) — minimal data, no query storage

## Links
- Website: https://amiexilai.com
- API: https://amiexilai-api-production.up.railway.app
- Contact: hello@amiexilai.com
